overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an urban plaza with large rock formations and modern office buildings, transitioning into a narrow rock canyon. The scene is set during twilight with clear skies and cool blue lighting typical of game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with scattered rock formations and office building

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the open plaza, navigating between large rock boulders with an office building visible to the right

entered.detail: tall beige office building with multiple windows dominating the right side of the frame
dark textured rock formation rising from the gravel ground on the left
large dark rock formation partially obscuring the view of the building on the right
grey gravel surface covering the ground throughout the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza scattered with large dark rock formations. A modern beige office building rises prominently on the right side while the ground is covered in grey gravel. The sky is clear with cool blue twilight lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock canyon passage between tall stone walls

events.description: transitioning from open plaza into narrow rock canyon as the office building passes out of view

agents.ego_description: character continuing to walk forward through the narrowing rock corridor, moving deeper into the canyon between tall stone walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall rock wall on the right side creating an enclosed corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow rock canyon with steep dark walls rising on both sides. The office building is no longer visible as the character moves deeper into the enclosed passage. The gravel path continues through the canyon with only a strip of sky visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open urban plaza into the depths of a narrow rock canyon. It begins with the character walking across grey gravel scattered with large dark rock formations, with a modern beige office building rising prominently to the right under a cool blue twilight sky. As the character advances, the open plaza gradually gives way to steep dark walls that rise on both sides, obscuring the city architecture. The scene then shifts into an enclosed passage where the office building vanishes entirely, leaving only a thin strip of sky visible overhead. Finally, the camera follows the gravel path deeper into the canyon as the environment becomes fully constrained by the towering rock faces.
